subject: tieng-anh
topic: Ôn tập giữa học kỳ 2 — Tiếng Anh lớp 5

questions.question: What does 'get up' mean? (Cụm 'get up' nghĩa là gì?)
What is the English for 'ăn sáng'? ('ăn sáng' tiếng Anh là gì?)
What does 'every day' mean? (Cụm 'every day' nghĩa là gì?)
What does 'It is seven o'clock.' mean? (Câu này nghĩa là gì?)
Complete: 'I ___ up at 6 o'clock.' (Em thức dậy lúc 6 giờ — điền 'get')
Match the daily activity with its meaning (Nối hoạt động hằng ngày với nghĩa)
Choose the correct question about time (Chọn câu hỏi đúng về giờ giấc)
options: What time do you get up?

questions.question: Which word shows how often something happens? (Từ nào chỉ mức độ thường xuyên?)
Complete: 'go to ___' means 'đi ngủ' (điền từ còn thiếu)
Complete: 'She ___ TV in the evening.' (xem ti vi — ngôi thứ ba số ít)
Which is the correct order of a day? (Thứ tự đúng của một ngày?)
options: get up → have breakfast → go to school
go to bed → get up → have breakfast
go to school → get up → have breakfast
have breakfast → go to bed → get up

questions.question: Match the time of day with its meaning (Nối buổi trong ngày với nghĩa)

questions.passage: Every morning, Lan gets up at 6 o'clock. She has breakfast and then goes to school at 7. In the evening, she does her homework and goes to bed at 9 o'clock.
questions.question: What time does Lan get up? (Lan thức dậy lúc mấy giờ?)

questions.passage: Every morning, Lan gets up at 6 o'clock. She has breakfast and then goes to school at 7. In the evening, she does her homework and goes to bed at 9 o'clock.
questions.question: What does Lan do in the evening? (Lan làm gì vào buổi tối?)

questions.passage: Every morning, Lan gets up at 6 o'clock. She has breakfast and then goes to school at 7. In the evening, she does her homework and goes to bed at 9 o'clock.
questions.question: What time does Lan go to bed? (Lan đi ngủ lúc mấy giờ?)
You want to ask a friend about her daily routine (Em muốn hỏi bạn về thói quen hằng ngày)
options: What do you do every day?
Every day you what do is?
